text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, November 10. No work meetings today. You have Sarah wanting to work on her design course and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Putting together our grocery list. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Yum, that sounds delicious! Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is practicing Jingle Bells for the upcoming piano recital. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. I've got the schedule covered. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: I can help troubleshoot that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Having dinner with our friends tonight. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've noted the plans. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Healthy choices are great. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Sounds exciting! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the lawn mower is having issues starting. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Automations are great when they work. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Toddlers are full of energy. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we got invited to a neighbor's house. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
